MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON DEC-03-2024 IN 206, (9:40AM) NO APPEARANCE BY MOVING PARTY. THE COURT DENIED PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER GRANTING RELIEF FROM WAIVER OF TRIAL BY JURY FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR, INSUFFICIENT NOTICE, AND FAILURE TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES. THE COURT ISSUED SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $500.00, PAYABLE BY 12/17/24. (10:10AM) MOVING PARTY/ATTORNEY ILAN JANFAZA ARRIVED LATE AND MATTER WAS CALLED AGAIN. THE COURT SET ASIDE THE SANCTIONS ISSUED EARLIER. THE COURT DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER GRANTING RELIEF FROM WAIVER OF TRIAL BY JURY FOR INSUFFICIENT NOTICE AND FAILURE TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES.
